title: Minecraft Randomizer
description: A datapack that randomizes many Minecraft elements.
body:
This datapack randomizes many features of Minecraft.

Random events can happen every few seconds. Here are some examples:
- Some of your attribute values (such as "gravity" or "scale") are changed
- Random items from your inventory are removed
- Random status effects are applied to you
- Random entities are spawned near you
And more to come!
